description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build FBGEMM GenAI x86 Linux Wheels that runs on pull requests, pushes to the main and nightly branches, and specific tags, as well as on workflow dispatch. The workflow generates a build matrix for FBGEMM GenAI x86 Linux wheels, filters the matrix based on certain conditions, and then uses the filtered matrix to build the wheels. The workflow requires write permission for ID tokens and read permission for repository contents.
